name: Azure Trusted Launch (Hyper-V vTPM)
description: Azure Virtual Machines with Trusted Launch (Gen 2 VMs with vTPM + Secure Boot enabled) expose a virtual TPM 2.0 implemented by Microsoft Hyper-V. EK cert chains to a Microsoft vTPM CA.
attestation-endpoint: https://shared.attest.azure.net/ (Azure Attestation service — JWT-signed attestation report)
notes: Azure Trusted Launch integrates with Microsoft Defender for Cloud + Azure Attestation for policy-gated boot integrity. Confidential Computing VMs (AMD SEV-SNP / Intel TDX) layer additional CPU-level attestation on top of the vTPM.
source: Azure Trusted Launch documentation + Microsoft PKI cert publication feed.
